steps.title: Notice the expression being asked for
steps.content: The question asks for $x-7$. The left side $4x-28$ can be factored as $4(x-7)$, so you can get $x-7$ without solving for $x$ first.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is the value of $4x-28$, not $x-7$. The requested expression is $x-7$, and its value is $-6$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $-6$ matches choice C, so C is correct.
